description: generate a publication-quality infographic via Nano Banana Pro with optional Perplexity research and Gemini iterative quality review (needs OPENROUTER_API_KEY + network)
rules: calls OpenRouter: Nano Banana Pro (image), Gemini 3.x Pro (quality review), Perplexity Sonar (optional research)
smart iteration — regenerates only while the quality score is below the document-type threshold
produces local files only (image + *_review_log.json, plus *_research.json when RESEARCH=1) under record_store; mutates no remote/live service
requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY and network — degrades gracefully offline
usage: Set PROMPT (content) and OUTPUT_NAME (image filename). Optional: INFOGRAPHIC_TYPE, STYLE, PALETTE, DOC_TYPE, ITERATIONS, RESEARCH=1. Provide OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: the image, ${OUTPUT_NAME%.png}_review_log.json, and a generate.log under record_store.
limitation: Needs a valid OPENROUTER_API_KEY + network reachability to openrouter.ai. Without them the porter records the failure to generate.log and exits cleanly without producing an image.
